items.title: US launches new strikes on Iran, targeting missile sites and boats
items.summary: US Central Command says the strikes were taken in "self-defense". It comes as senior Iranian negotiators are in Qatar for talks to end the war.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 巴基斯坦巴士驚傳撞車 釀17死5傷
items.summary: 巴基斯坦開伯爾-普什圖省馬爾丹（Mardan）附近道路，25日驚傳1輛小型巴士撞到停放在路邊的車輛，造成巴士上17人死亡、5人受傷。  據《美聯社》報導，巴基斯坦1122急救...…
